examples: I think humour is a great lubricant for life.
Its nozzle was smeared with some kind of lubricant.
Conservative treatment involves plucking "offending" eyelashes and administering lubricant drops.
Migration across borders is an essential lubricant to economic growth and one group of migrants is particularly important: entrepreneurs.
Communications technologies of all kinds function as an economic lubricant, reducing friction in the economy and thus accelerating economic growth.
